# PS(1) — Terminal Depths Man Page

## NAME
  ps — report a snapshot of current processes

## SYNOPSIS
  ps [aux]

## DESCRIPTION
Shows running processes on the system. PID 1337 is the CHIMERA heartbeat.

## OPTIONS
  aux  show all processes with user and command info

## EXAMPLES
  ps
  ps aux
  ps aux | grep nexus

## SEE ALSO
  top, kill, nice
